insert-page-range-into-pdf.title: Insert Page Range into PDF
insert-page-range-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a specific range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.title: Insert Page Range into PDF Using Streams
insert-page-range-into-pdf-using-streams.description: Demonstrates how to insert a specific range of pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF by working with file streams and the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Insert method.

insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.title: Insert Specific Pages from One PDF into Another
insert-specific-pages-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a specified position using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-specific-pages-into-pdf-using-str.title: Insert Specific Pages from One PDF into Another Using Streams
insert-specific-pages-into-pdf-using-str.description: Shows how to insert selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor with stream overloads.

insert-pages-at-start-of-pdf.title: Insert Pages at Start of PDF using PdfFileEditor
insert-pages-at-start-of-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to prepend all pages from a source PDF to another PDF by using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.Insert method.

insert-pages-into-pdf-at-middle.title: Insert Pages into PDF at Middle Position
insert-pages-into-pdf-at-middle.description: Demonstrates how to insert a range of pages from a source PDF into the middle of another PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

append-pdf-pages-using-pdffileeditor.title: Append PDF Pages Using PdfFileEditor
append-pdf-pages-using-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates how to append all pages from a source PDF to the end of a destination PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor. The example retrieves the source page count with Document and writes the merged result to a new file.

insert-pages-into-pdf-in-memory.title: Insert Pages into PDF in Memory using Aspose.Pdf
insert-pages-into-pdf-in-memory.description: Shows how to create PDFs entirely in memory, then insert selected pages from a source PDF into a destination PDF using PdfFileEditor and retrieve the merged result in a MemoryStream.

batch-insert-page-ranges.title: Batch Insert Page Ranges from Multiple PDFs
batch-insert-page-ranges.description: Shows how to iteratively insert specific page ranges from several source PDFs into a base PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

insert-pages-multiple-pdfs-into-base.title: Insert Pages from Multiple PDFs into a Base PDF
insert-pages-multiple-pdfs-into-base.description: Demonstrates how to append a specific page range from several source PDFs into a base PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor. The example validates file existence, performs the merge, and handles errors.

load-pdf-document-from-file.title: Load PDF Document from File Path
load-pdf-document-from-file.description: Shows how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Document, check its page count, and optionally save it.

load-pdf-and-save-with-aspose-pdf.title: Load PDF and Save to New File
load-pdf-and-save-with-aspose-pdf.description: The example demonstrates how to load an existing PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and then save it to a new location, including basic error handling for missing files.

insert-image-into-pdf-and-save-modified-.title: Insert Image into PDF and Save Modified File
insert-image-into-pdf-and-save-modified-.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to bind an existing PDF, insert an image onto a specific page at given coordinates, and save the modified document to a new file.

rotate-first-pdf-page-save-to-memorystre.title: Rotate First PDF Page and Save to MemoryStream
rotate-first-pdf-page-save-to-memorystre.description: Loads a PDF, rotates the first page 90° clockwise, and saves the modified document directly to a MemoryStream without writing to disk.

split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page
split-pdf-from-first-to-end-page.description: Demonstrates how to extract pages 1 through a given end page from a PDF and save the result using Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-from-first-page-to-end-page.title: Split PDF from First Page to Specified End Page Using Streams
split-pdf-from-first-page-to-end-page.description: Shows how to split a PDF from the first page up to a given end page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor with in‑memory streams.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Ranges
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-ranges.description: Shows how to split a PDF into multiple documents based on defined start‑end page ranges using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.title: Split PDF into Bulk Page Sets Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-bulk-page-sets.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into multiple page ranges (bulks) with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and retrieve each bulk as a MemoryStream.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end.title: Split PDF from Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end.description: Shows how to split a PDF starting at a given 1‑based page number to the end of the document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

split-pdf-from-start-to-end.title: Split PDF from Start Page to End Using Aspose.Pdf
split-pdf-from-start-to-end.description: Shows how to extract pages from a given start page to the end of a PDF and return the result as a MemoryStream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-pdfs.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs Using Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-page-pdfs.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDFs by reading the source file as a stream, using PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages, and writing each resulting MemoryStream to a file.

split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs__v2.title: Split PDF into Single-Page PDFs Using MemoryStream
split-pdf-into-single-page-pdfs__v2.description: Shows how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by using PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages to get an array of MemoryStream objects and writing each stream to a uniquely named file.

concatenate-split-pdfs-insertpages.title: Concatenate Split PDFs Using InsertPages
concatenate-split-pdfs-insertpages.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple split PDF files into a single document by iteratively inserting pages with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Insert.

extract-first-n-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.title: Extract First N Pages from PDF using SplitFromFirst
extract-first-n-pages-pdf-splitfromfirst.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst to extract pages from the beginning of a PDF up to a specified page and save them as a new file.

extract-first-n-pages-using-splitfromfir.title: Extract First N Pages from PDF Using SplitFromFirst and Streams
extract-first-n-pages-using-splitfromfir.description: Demonstrates how to split the first N pages of a PDF into an in‑memory stream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitFromFirst, then optionally save the result to a file.

split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.title: Split PDF into Multiple Page Ranges Using SplitToBulks
split-pdf-into-multiple-page-ranges.description: Shows how to split a PDF into separate documents based on defined page ranges using Aspose.Pdf's SplitToBulks method and save each part as an individual PDF file.

split-pdf-into-bulks-using-memorystreams.title: Split PDF into Bulks Using MemoryStreams
split-pdf-into-bulks-using-memorystreams.description: Shows how to split a PDF into multiple page ranges (bulks) with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToBulks and process the resulting MemoryStream objects.

split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.title: Split PDF from Specific Page to End
split-pdf-from-page-to-end__v2.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToEnd to extract pages starting at a given page through the end of a PDF and save them as a new document.

split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end-using-s.title: Split PDF from a Start Page to End Using Streams
split-pdf-from-start-page-to-end-using-s.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF from a specified start page to the end using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with input and output streams, keeping the result in memory before saving to a file.

split-pdf-into-individual-pages.title: Split PDF into Individual Page PDFs
split-pdf-into-individual-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to split a PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using a filename template.

split-pdf-into-individual-page-streams.title: Split PDF into Individual Page Streams
split-pdf-into-individual-page-streams.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages to split a PDF into separate MemoryStream objects for each page and save them as individual PDF files.

delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.title: Delete Pages 2‑5 from PDF Using File‑Path Overload
delete-pages-from-pdf-file-path.description: Demonstrates how to remove specific pages (2 through 5) from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with the file‑path overload.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF using PdfFileEditor
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF by opening input and output streams and calling Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Delete.

remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.title: Remove First and Last Pages from PDF
remove-first-and-last-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to delete the first and last pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor Delete method with an integer array.

batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages from Multiple PDFs
batch-delete-pages-from-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a directory of PDF files and delete specified pages from each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

validate-pdf-page-deletion.title: Validate PDF Page Deletion with Aspose.Pdf
validate-pdf-page-deletion.description: Demonstrates deleting specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and verifying the page count before and after the operation.

merge-three-pdfs-using-pdffileeditor.title: Merge Three PDFs Using Aspose PdfFileEditor
merge-three-pdfs-using-pdffileeditor.description: Demonstrates how to merge three PDF documents into a single file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor’s three‑argument Concatenate method, with a temporary intermediate file for the first two PDFs.

merge-multiple-pdf-streams.title: Merge Multiple PDF Streams into a Single PDF
merge-multiple-pdf-streams.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate an array of PDF input streams into one output stream using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-two-pdfs.title: Concatenate Two PDFs into a New PDF
concatenate-two-pdfs.description: Shows how to merge two existing PDF files into a single PDF document using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileEditor Concatenate overload.

merge-pdfs-from-memory-streams.title: Merge PDFs from Memory Streams and Save Directly to File
merge-pdfs-from-memory-streams.description: Creates two PDF documents entirely in memory, then concatenates them using PdfFileEditor and writes the merged PDF straight to a file without any intermediate storage.

batch-concatenate-pdfs.title: Batch Concatenate PDFs in a Folder
batch-concatenate-pdfs.description: Shows how to combine all PDF files from a specified directory into a single PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.title: Measure PDF Concatenation Performance Using Stream Overloads
measure-pdf-concatenation-performance.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate fifty small PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor stream overloads and measures the execution time with a Stopwatch.

compare-pdf-concatenation-overloads.title: Compare PDF Concatenation Overloads (File Path vs Stream)
compare-pdf-concatenation-overloads.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf's file‑path and stream overloads while measuring memory consumption for each approach.

create-pdf-booklet.title: Create PDF Booklet Using Aspose.Pdf
create-pdf-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document using the PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet method with default settings.

create-booklet-a5-pdf.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom A5 Page Size
create-booklet-a5-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet from an existing PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet overload that accepts a custom page size (A5).

create-booklet-pdf-left-right-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Left/Right Page Order
create-booklet-pdf-left-right-pages.description: Shows how to split a source PDF into odd (right‑hand) and even (left‑hand) page collections and generate a booklet using Aspose.Pdf's MakeBooklet method.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size Using Streams
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor facade, reading and writing via streams and specifying a custom page size such as A5.

create-pdf-booklets.title: Create Booklet PDFs for Multiple Files
create-pdf-booklets.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF for each source PDF and place the result in a dedicated output folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pages-and-create-booklet.title: Delete Pages and Create Booklet from PDF
delete-pages-and-create-booklet.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF file and then generate a booklet layout using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.title: Delete Pages and Concatenate PDFs with PdfFileEditor
delete-pages-concatenate-pdfs.description: Demonstrates removing selected pages from a PDF and then merging the edited PDF with another document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

delete-specific-pages-with-error-handlin.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF with Error Handling
delete-specific-pages-with-error-handlin.description: Demonstrates how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor while checking for a missing input file and handling the operation result.

batch-create-pdf-booklets-audit-logging.title: Batch Create PDF Booklets with Audit Logging
batch-create-pdf-booklets-audit-logging.description: Demonstrates processing multiple PDF files, converting each into a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor, and writing detailed audit information to a text log.

create-custom-booklet-pdf.title: Create Custom Booklet PDF with Specified Page Order
create-custom-booklet-pdf.description: Demonstrates generating a booklet PDF using PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet with custom left and right page arrays and verifies the resulting page order by extracting text from each page.

resize-pdf-to-letter-size.title: Resize PDF to Letter Size Using PdfPageEditor
resize-pdf-to-letter-size.description: Demonstrates how to resize all pages of a PDF to Letter dimensions using the PdfPageEditor facade with the file‑path overload, and save the result as a new file.

resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-dimensions.title: Resize PDF Pages to Custom Dimensions Using Stream Overload
resize-pdf-pages-to-custom-dimensions.description: Shows how to resize all pages of a PDF to 8.5×11 inches (612 × 792 points) by using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with the stream overload and page resize parameters.

batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.title: Batch Resize PDFs to A4 Using PdfPageEditor
batch-resize-pdfs-to-a4.description: Shows how to loop through all PDF files in a folder and resize each document to A4 page size using Aspose.Pdf's PdfPageEditor facade.

measure-pdf-resize-performance-path-vs-s.title: Measure PDF Resize Performance: Path vs Stream Overloads
measure-pdf-resize-performance-path-vs-s.description: Demonstrates how to resize a large PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfPageEditor and compares the execution time of the file‑path overload versus the stream overload.

create-2up-pdf-layout.title: Create 2‑up PDF Layout with Aspose.PdfFileEditor
create-2up-pdf-layout.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to generate a 2‑up (two pages per sheet) PDF by specifying columns and rows, and saves the result to a new file.

create-4up-pdf-using-streams.title: Create a 4‑up PDF using PdfFileEditor and streams
create-4up-pdf-using-streams.description: Demonstrates applying a 4‑up (2 × 2) layout to a PDF via the PdfFileEditor.MakeNUp stream overload and storing the result in a memory stream.

batch-create-3x2-nup-pdfs.title: Batch Create 3‑by‑2 N‑up PDFs
batch-create-3x2-nup-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process multiple PDF files and generate N‑up versions with three columns and two rows using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.title: Create N‑up Layout and Convert to Booklet PDF
create-nup-and-booklet-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a 2×2 N‑up PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then transform that intermediate file into a printable booklet.

delete-pages-resize-pdf-contents.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Contents
delete-pages-resize-pdf-contents.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then resize the remaining page contents before saving the document.

remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.title: Remove Specified Pages from Multiple PDFs in Parallel
remove-pages-from-multiple-pdfs-in-paral.description: Shows how to delete given page numbers from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor.

concatenate-pdfs-using-stream-overloads.title: Concatenate PDFs Using Stream Overloads
concatenate-pdfs-using-stream-overloads.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document by passing file streams to Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.Concatenate.

test-delete-throws-exception-out-of-rang.title: Test Delete Throws Exception for Out-of-Range Pages
test-delete-throws-exception-out-of-rang.description: Demonstrates an NUnit unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Delete raises an exception when attempting to delete page numbers beyond the PDF's length.

create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.title: Create Booklet PDF from Stream
create-booklet-pdf-from-stream.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to convert an input PDF stream into a booklet‑formatted PDF and return it as a MemoryStream.

create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.title: Create PDF Booklet with Custom Page Order
create-pdf-booklet-custom-page-order.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to generate a booklet PDF by specifying left and right page sequences.

create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size__v2.title: Create Booklet PDF with Custom Page Size
create-booklet-pdf-custom-page-size__v2.description: Demonstrates how to generate a booklet PDF from an existing PDF stream using a custom 5.5×8.5‑inch page size and save it to disk.

validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.title: Validate PDF Concatenation Preserves Page Order
validate-pdf-concatenation-page-order.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then verify that the original page order and content are retained in the resulting document.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdfs.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDFs
delete-specific-pages-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove pages 3 and 4 from every PDF in a source directory and save the modified files to a destination folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.title: Merge Multiple PDFs with Logging
merge-multiple-pdfs-with-logging.description: Demonstrates how to concatenate several PDF files into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor while logging the input and output file names.

create-booklet-left-odd-pages.title: Create Booklet PDF with Left Pages as Odd Numbers
create-booklet-left-odd-pages.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet to reorder pages and generate a booklet PDF where left‑hand pages are odd‑numbered.

resize-pdf-pages-using-streams.title: Resize PDF Pages to Custom Dimensions Using Streams
resize-pdf-pages-using-streams.description: Demonstrates resizing all pages of a PDF to 1024 × 768 points via the PdfFileEditor stream overload and verifies the new page dimensions.

batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.title: Batch Delete Pages and Merge PDFs
batch-delete-pages-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to remove specified pages from several PDF files and then concatenate the cleaned PDFs into one document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-multiple-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to merge several PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor. The program validates input files, concatenates them, and writes the result to a user‑specified output path.

merge-pdfs-from-urls.title: Merge PDFs from URLs without Temporary Files
merge-pdfs-from-urls.description: Shows how to download PDF files into memory streams and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to concatenate them into a single PDF saved locally, avoiding intermediate files.

test-makebooklet-null-pagesize.title: Test MakeBooklet Throws Exception for Null PageSize
test-makebooklet-null-pagesize.description: Shows how to verify that PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet raises an exception when the custom PageSize argument is null.

delete-pdf-pages-get-size.title: Delete Specific PDF Pages and Return File Size
delete-pdf-pages-get-size.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and obtain the size of the resulting document.

concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.title: Concatenate PDFs with Blank Pages
concatenate-pdfs-with-blank-pages.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document while automatically inserting a blank page between each source PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdfs-to-a5-and-create-booklet.title: Resize PDFs to A5 and Generate Booklet
resize-pdfs-to-a5-and-create-booklet.description: Demonstrates batch processing of PDF files by resizing each document to A5 using PdfPageEditor and then creating a booklet from the resized file with PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet.

delete-pages-apply-two-up-layout.title: Delete Pages and Apply 2‑up Layout to PDF
delete-pages-apply-two-up-layout.description: Shows how to remove selected pages from a PDF stream and then create a 2‑up (side‑by‑side) layout using Aspose.Pdf, saving the result to an output stream.

create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-o.title: Create Booklet PDF with Specified Page Order
create-booklet-pdf-with-specified-page-o.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF by defining left and right page sequences using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.title: Concatenate PDFs While Preserving Original Metadata
concatenate-pdfs-preserve-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to merge multiple PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and then copy the author, title, and other metadata from the first document to the merged output.

create-booklet-pdf-with-page-deletion.title: Create Booklet PDF with Page Deletion and Resizing
create-booklet-pdf-with-page-deletion.description: Demonstrates how to delete specific pages, resize page contents, and convert a PDF into a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-booklet-pdf-using-pdffileeditor.title: Create Booklet PDF Using PdfFileEditor
create-booklet-pdf-using-pdffileeditor.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF from existing documents with Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet and validates the resulting file.

concatenate-pdfs-from-zip.title: Concatenate PDFs from a ZIP Archive and Update the Archive
concatenate-pdfs-from-zip.description: The example extracts all PDF files from a ZIP archive, merges them into a single PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and writes the merged document back into the same archive.

delete-pdf-pages.title: Delete Pages from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
delete-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates a command‑line utility that removes specified pages from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor and saves the result to a new file.

parallel-pdf-page-deletion.title: Parallel Deletion of PDF Pages using Aspose.Pdf
parallel-pdf-page-deletion.description: Demonstrates how to delete specified pages from multiple PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileEditor within a Parallel.ForEach loop.

rotate-pdf-landscape-create-booklet.title: Rotate PDF to Landscape and Generate Booklet
rotate-pdf-landscape-create-booklet.description: Loads a PDF, rotates all pages to landscape orientation using PdfPageEditor, then creates a booklet from the rotated document with PdfFileEditor.MakeBooklet and saves the result.

test-pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-inp.title: Test PdfFileEditor Concatenate Throws on Empty Input
test-pdffileeditor-concatenate-empty-inp.description: Demonstrates an NUnit unit test that verifies PdfFileEditor.Concatenate throws an ArgumentException when called with an empty array of input streams.

concatenate-multiple-pdfs__v2.title: Concatenate Multiple PDFs into a Single Document
concatenate-multiple-pdfs__v2.description: Shows how to merge several PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor with stream handling.

log-pdf-page-deletions-audit.title: Log PDF Page Deletions with Audit Trail
log-pdf-page-deletions-audit.description: Demonstrates deleting specific pages from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and recording the number of pages removed in an audit log.

resize-pdfs-create-booklet.title: Resize PDFs and Create a Booklet
resize-pdfs-create-booklet.description: Demonstrates how to resize multiple PDF files to a specific page size, concatenate them, and generate a booklet using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.title: Delete Specific Pages from Multiple PDFs
delete-pages-from-multiple-pdfs.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor to remove given page numbers from each PDF in a collection and save the cleaned files.

insert-blank-separator-pages-when-mergin.title: Insert Blank Separator Pages When Merging PDFs
insert-blank-separator-pages-when-mergin.description: Demonstrates how to add a single‑page blank PDF as a separator between multiple PDFs during concatenation using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-and-merge-pdfs.title: Resize PDFs to 1024x768 and Merge into One Document
resize-and-merge-pdfs.description: Shows how to resize multiple PDF files to a fixed 1024x768 page size using PdfPageEditor and then concatenate them into a single PDF using PdfFileEditor.

delete-pages-and-resize-pdf.title: Delete Pages and Resize PDF Content
delete-pages-and-resize-pdf.description: Shows how to remove specific pages from a PDF, resize the remaining page contents, and return the processed document as a MemoryStream.

concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.title: Concatenate PDFs and Add Page Numbers
concatenate-pdfs-add-page-numbers.description: Shows how to merge multiple PDF files into a single document and automatically insert page numbers using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

create-a-function-that-generates-a-bookl.title: Create A Function That Generates A Booklet Using Left Pages From The First Half Of The Source Pdf

create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.title: Create Booklet from Second Half Right Pages
create-booklet-from-second-half-right-pa.description: Shows how to generate a booklet PDF that includes only the odd‑numbered (right‑hand) pages from the second half of a source PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
